events.fact: Character 'Conrad' created and world 'Terra Conrad' generated.
Player arrives in Valheim via Valkyrie transport.
Discovered the Vegvisir (boss stone) for Eikthyr, one of the Forsaken.
First combat encounter: Killed a boar and collected leather scraps.
Killed a Neck and collected meat.
Discovered flint along the water's edge.
Located the sacrificial altar for the first boss, Eikthyr.
Crafted a hammer, unlocking basic building structures.
Discovered a ship-shaped rock formation indicating potential buried treasure.
Discovered an abandoned structure containing a beehive (The Golden Ones).
Built a workbench, unlocking advanced crafting and building recipes.
Built a bed inside a new structure.
Completed the first shelter with a roof to provide 'sheltered' status.
Set spawn point at the bed and slept through the first night.
Acquired the 'Rested' buff for the first time.
